resources.name: Full lifecycle: create → get → list → update → publish → archive → delete
Versioning and auto-archive: publish v2 archives v1
Mixed rate cards round-trip: flat + unit (with discount) + graduated
Full lifecycle: create → get → list → update → publish → archive → delete
Versioning and auto-archive: publish v2 archives v1
Invalid draft: create accepted, validation errors on GET, publish rejected, fix + republish
Attach lifecycle: create plan+addon → attach → get → list → update phase → detach → verify list
Publish plan with attached addon: plan-addon junction survives status transition
Duplicate attachment rejected with 409
Plan: invalid currency rejected (TODO: tighten to 400 currency_invalid)
Plan: zero phases rejected with 400 schema min_items
Plan: duplicate phase key rejected with code plan_phase_duplicated_key
Plan publish-time validations: non-last missing duration, last with duration, phase no rate cards
Addon: non-existent feature id rejected with 400
Plan-addon attach status matrix: active plan rejected, archived addon rejected
